arts.ttl: Preview: Fiorentina vs. Bologna - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Serie A clash between Fiorentina and Bologna, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Fiorentina are coming off a 2-1 defeat to Venezia that has all but ruled them out of a top four finish, but also puts them at risk of missing out on European football next season. On the other hand, ...
